Container.Name: plex-dbrepair
Container.Overview:
You must mount your Plex container's appdata folder into this container.
Example: /mnt/user/appdata/plex
Inside this folder you should see the directory structure: Library/Application Support/Plex Media Server
Do NOT mount the Library folder itself. Mount the parent Plex appdata directory.
The script runs once automatically and repairs the Plex database, then the container exits.
No Plex container or Plex process should be running during repair.
Check container logs to monitor progress. You may also open the console and run "top" to verify activity.
Container.Requires: YOU ARE ULTIMATELY RESPONSIBLE FOR YOUR DATA. PLEX MUST BE STOPPED BEFORE RUNNING THIS TOOL. Mount your Plex appdata folder into this container.

Config.Name: Plex Appdata Folder
Config.Description: Path to your Plex container appdata folder (the folder that CONTAINS the 'Library' directory). Example: /mnt/user/appdata/plex. Inside this folder you should see 'Library/Application Support/Plex Media Server'. Do NOT mount the Library folder itself.

Config.Name: DBREPAIR_MODE
Config.Description: automatic (check, vacuum, reindex) · check (integrity check only) · vacuum (optimize database) · repair (alias for vacuum) · reindex (rebuild indexes) · deflate (VACUUM INTO rewrite) · prune (clear PhotoTranscoder cache)

Config.Name: ALLOW_PLEX_KILL
Config.Description: T/F If enabled, the container will stop running Plex containers before database operations begin. Requires /var/run/docker.sock.

Config.Name: PLEX_CONTAINER_MATCH
Config.Description: Pattern used to identify Plex containers to stop by name or image.

Config.Name: RESTART_PLEX
Config.Description: T/F Restart Plex containers after repairs complete.

Config.Name: PRUNE_DAYS
Config.Description: Files older than this number of days will be removed from the PhotoTranscoder cache when using DBREPAIR_MODE=prune.

Config.Name: ENABLE_BACKUPS
Config.Description: T/F Create timestamped database backups before any changes.

Config.Name: RESTORE_LAST_BACKUP
Config.Description: T/F Restore most recent backup and exit.

Config.Name: EXCLUDE_CONTAINER_NAMES
Config.Description: CSV list of containers that should never be stopped.

Config.Name: EXCLUDE_IMAGE_REGEX
Config.Description: Image regex used to avoid stopping the dbrepair container itself.

Config.Name: Docker Run Socket
Config.Description: Required to manage Plex containers from Unraid.
